mapper.insert: insert into student_paper(student_id, activity_id, paper_id, attempt, total_score, start_time, submit_time) values(#{studentId},#{activityId},#{paperId},#{attempt},#{totalScore},#{startTime},#{submitTime})
mapper.select: select attempt from student_paper where student_id=#{userId} and paper_id=#{id}
select sp.id,sp.attempt,sp.total_score from student_paper sp left join exam e on sp.paper_id = e.paper_id where sp.student_id=#{studentId} and sp.paper_id=#{paperId} and e.show_result = 1
